introSection: Jumbo Jet was a steel roller coaster formerly located at Coney Island in Brooklyn, New York, USA.

sections.title: History
sections.content: Jumbo Jet was closed on April 22, 2002 due to an issue with the trains. After sitting closed for a year, it was dismantled in 2003.

fullText:
Jumbo Jet was a steel roller coaster formerly located at Coney Island in Brooklyn, New York, USA.

Jumbo Jet was closed on April 22, 2002 due to an issue with the trains. After sitting closed for a year, it was dismantled in 2003.
